name: CustomGraphRenderer
summary: Base contract a graph renderer implements — render(positioned, resolvedTheme, target) consuming a PositionedGraph (coordinates from a CustomGraphLayout) plus resolved webtheme tokens and returning a GraphHandle. Satisfied alike by the native-first SVG default (Frontier UI's canonical impl) and by every adapter (Cytoscape, sigma, canvas). Consumes coordinates + theme, never the GraphSpec directly, so swapping impls leaves both spec and layout untouched.
